input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.6.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.6.2.1
            TITLE: all tire changes after a vehicle has received the green flag to start the endurance event must

            CONTENT:
            rule D.6.2.1: All tire changes after a vehicle has received the Green flag to start the Endurance Event must
D.6.2.1 All tire changes after a vehicle has received the Green flag to start the Endurance Event must 
take place in the Driver Change Area.

final_answer: All tire changes after a vehicle has received the Green flag to start the Endurance Event must take place in the Driver Change Area.
